== Notes for [[Item:Q111488|Q111488]] ==

Egilo (?)1

b. circa 825

Egilo (?) was born circa 825. She married Gatón, conde del Bierzo, son of Ramiro Iº Bermúdez, rey de Asturias and señora gallega Gontrada (?), before 850.1

Family

Gatón, conde del Bierzo b. circa 820, d. 866

Child

Hermesenda Gatónez+ b. c 850

Citations

[S1342] Casas Reales, online http://www.abcgenealogia.com/Familias3.html, Casa Real de Asturias y León.

Condesa

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal10983

RESEARCH NOTES:
3 children

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
